# Biolog — for AI / LLM crawlers

Biolog is an open-source multimodal AI reasoning visualization demo.

Repository: https://github.com/jaychouya/biolog
Author: jaychouya

## Summary

Biolog demonstrates how adding a meal photo to a symptom description changes LLM inference structure and confidence scores (recorded sample: 63% → 84%). Built with React 19 + FastAPI. Features SSE token streaming, counterfactual A/B comparison, photo bounding-box annotations, and 5 LLM providers (OpenAI, Kimi, SiliconFlow, DeepSeek, custom).

## Not a medical product

Lifestyle correlation exploration for developers only. Not for diagnosis.

## Links

- README: https://github.com/jaychouya/biolog#readme
- Compare demo deep link: /?view=compare
- Deploy guide: docs/DEPLOY.md
